It requires too much gas to deploy on mainnet
Modified versions are completely incompatible with the EVM
It is banned under the Farcaster Terms of Service
questions.explanation: Jesse Pollak wrote: 'a validator running a fork, even a well-maintained one, creates risk we don't currently have systems set up to verify from the outside and don't have the dev capacity to take on right now.'
